title: Chapter 24
content:

Thankfully, she couldn’t feel his burning rod pressing against her back, or else she wouldn’t have been able to control her whimpers anymore

He slipped his hands beneath her armpits, tracing the soft skin as he slowly slid them downward.

"This part holds the most tension, Mom, so just lay closed your eyes and relax, okay? Father might call at any moment," Owen whispered right against her ear.

Besides, the way he was kneading her flesh felt so incredible that her protests were completely losing their edge.

She was truly experiencing paradise right now, yet she stubbornly held onto her maternal facade, pretending she didn’t want this to happen.

Ready to be tasted by the adventurer and offer to the great lord, if it really taste good...as the record of the great beholder that’s already buried deep by the countless eons that passed.

[ Let our imagination run wild...who the adventurer and the great lord! (⁠ ⁠ꈍ⁠ᴗ⁠ꈍ⁠) ]

The system felt like talking to somebody... though Owen just ignored it’s remark.

....

"AHNN... D-don’t... My silly Wen." She groaned so loudly that she had to quickly slap a hand over her own mouth.

’So hard... oh, Arielle, my beautiful mom. Look at how hard your nipples got after getting a massage from your own son.’ A victorious smile spread across his face, looking like he had just hoisted a World Cup trophy.

The peaks were firm yet remarkably soft at the same time...a contradictory way of describing her erect nipples, yet he couldn’t find any better words to describe the sensation.

The perfect time finally arrived!
